allow: Bash(python -c "import flet as ft; fp = ft.FilePicker\(\); print\([a for a in dir\(fp\) if 'result' in a.lower\(\) or 'upload' in a.lower\(\)]\)")
Bash(python -c "import flet as ft; fp = ft.FilePicker\(\); print\([a for a in dir\(fp\) if not a.startswith\('__'\)]\)")
Bash(python -c "import flet as ft; import inspect; print\(inspect.signature\(ft.FilePicker.pick_files\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import flet as ft; import inspect; src = inspect.getsource\(ft.FilePicker.pick_files\); print\(src\)")
Bash(python -c "import flet as ft; import inspect; sig = inspect.signature\(ft.Text.__init__\); print\(list\(sig.parameters.keys\(\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import flet as ft; print\([m for m in dir\(ft.Page\) if 'open' in m.lower\(\) or 'dialog' in m.lower\(\) or 'sheet' in m.lower\(\) or 'close' in m.lower\(\)]\)")
Bash(python -c "import flet as ft; import inspect; sig = inspect.signature\(ft.Page.show_dialog\); print\(sig\)")
Bash(python -c "import flet as ft; import inspect; sig = inspect.signature\(ft.Page.pop_dialog\); print\(sig\)")
Bash(python -c "import flet as ft; import inspect; sig = inspect.signature\(ft.BottomSheet.__init__\); print\(list\(sig.parameters.keys\(\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import flet as ft; print\(hasattr\(ft, 'GestureDetector'\)\); import inspect; sig = inspect.signature\(ft.ButtonStyle.__init__\); print\(list\(sig.parameters.keys\(\)\)[:15]\)")

PowerShell(cd "e:\\Repos Git\\flet_demo_mobile" && Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { \($_.Name -match "peerUn|peerun|peer_un|propuesta|\\.jsx|\\.tsx|screenshot" -or $_.FullName -match "peerUn|peerun|peer_un|propuesta|screenshot"\) -and $_.FullName -notmatch "\\.git" } | Select-Object FullName | Sort-Object FullName)
